name: The guarded hall
description:
You walk down a torch lit hallway. It has been carved out of pure stone. It is
very quiet in this hall. You notice rows of colored doors on each wall. To
your east, you see a &mpurple&n door. To your west, you see a &Rred&n door. The hall
itself leads south and north.

extra_descriptions.description: You see a red door. It has the name "Gorak" written on it.
You see a yellow door. It has the name "Sumaron" written on it.
